chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1603 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.5572/2022 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on M.A No.5573/2022 4. For hearing of main case 19.04.2022 Mr. Muhammad Aslam, advocate for petitioner *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. This petition concerns with the non-schedule load shedding and consequently this petition was filed to restrain the respondents from acting on non-schedule electricity load shedding. We are afraid that these questions cannot be resolved in petition under Article 199 of the Constitution against Hyderabad Electricity Supply Company, being entity under Company law; however, petitioner may approach the regulator i.e NEPRA and/or Civil Court for redressal of their grievance as for as non-schedule load shedding is concerned. This petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
